name: MQTT Connector
description: Connects Cascadia to any MQTT broker. Receives sensor data from IoT devices and publishes commands back.
author: Zyrcon Labs

setup_fields.name: broker_host
setup_fields.label: MQTT Broker Host
setup_fields.help_text: MQTT broker hostname or IP address

setup_fields.name: username
setup_fields.label: MQTT Username
setup_fields.help_text: Leave empty if broker requires no auth

setup_fields.name: use_tls
setup_fields.label: Use TLS encryption
setup_fields.help_text: Enable TLS for encrypted MQTT connection

setup_fields.name: approval_before_command
setup_fields.label: Require approval before publishing commands
setup_fields.help_text: Always approve before operators publish control commands

setup_fields.name: default_topics
setup_fields.label: Default sensor topics to subscribe
setup_fields.help_text: Comma-separated MQTT topics to subscribe to
